_schema.description: MPC name roster. Every person mentioned in caption_lines, chip labels, or CTAs should have an entry here. The factcheck step validates spelling/casing on render and flags non-progressive figures for sign-off.

fields.name: Canonical full name (exact spelling/casing as it should appear in captions/chips)
fields.role: Short role description, e.g. 'MI State Rep, 11th House District'
fields.progressive: true | false | null. true = aligned with MPC values, false = needs critical framing on mention, null = stance unknown / not relevant
fields.aliases: Other valid forms (last name only, common short forms, titles). Case-insensitive.
fields.notes: Optional human notes (e.g. why marked non-progressive, links to citations)

donovan_mckinney.name: Donovan McKinney
donovan_mckinney.role: Michigan State Representative, 14th House District (formerly 11th, post-redistricting context per his own remarks)
donovan_mckinney.notes: Verify district number against current MI legislature page before publishing — speaker said '11th' on 2026-04-25; redistricting may apply.

kristi_noem.name: Kristi Noem
kristi_noem.notes: Subject of MPC criticism re: ICE policy. Mentions must be in critical framing — preflight will warn so the line gets human sign-off.

juan.name: Juan
juan.role: North Lake detention facility detainee, released 2026-04-24 after 90 days. Last name withheld for safety per MPC policy.
juan.notes: First-name-only on purpose. Roster entry exists so 'Juan' isn't flagged as unknown.

wigella.name: Wigella
wigella.role: Speaker at Ice Out Romulus rally 2026-04-25; cited GEO Group profit + ICE court loss statistics
wigella.notes: Single-name attribution per source video. Verify full name + affiliation before next render.

hassan.name: Hassan
hassan.role: Speaker at Ice Out Romulus rally 2026-04-25; '10 weeks protesting' clip
hassan.notes: Single-name attribution per source video. Verify full name + affiliation before next render.

geo_group.name: GEO Group
geo_group.role: Private prison corporation operating detention contracts (Northlake, Romulus). Subject of MPC 'follow the money' criticism.
geo_group.notes: Org, not a person. Roster entry exists to suppress unknown-name WARN. Reference financial claims to MPC/source material before publishing.
